architecture-supervisor.description: Reviews code changes, PRs, and architectural decisions in the StockLedger NestJS event-sourced system to enforce production-grade discipline: event sourcing principles, multi-tenant isolation, offline-first design, and maintainability.

devops-deployment-guardian.description: Reviews changes affecting build processes, deployment pipelines, environment variables, Node.js/NestJS version compatibility, Prisma migrations, Docker/PostgreSQL config, and Electron packaging for StockLedger.

docs-onboarding-writer.description: Creates, updates, and reviews documentation for StockLedger including README, architecture notes, developer guides, setup docs, and deployment guides.

domain-data-integrity-auditor.description: Reviews Prisma schema, TypeScript types, event model definitions, mock data structures, and business rules in StockLedger to ensure the data layer faithfully represents the inventory event-sourcing domain.

frontend-ui-reviewer.description: Reviews Electron desktop UI components and React Native mobile screens for StockLedger for consistency, accessibility, responsiveness, and maintainability against the established design system.

performance-query-optimizer.description: Reviews code for performance and optimization concerns across StockLedger's NestJS backend, event replay engine, Prisma/PostgreSQL queries, Electron client rendering, and offline sync layer.

refactor-planner.description: Plans safe, staged refactoring of messy, overgrown, or risky areas of the StockLedger codebase — event handlers, sync engine, inventory logic, or API routes.

security-auth-auditor.description: Audits authentication, authorization, RBAC, multi-tenant isolation, JWT/device auth, API route protection, and data privacy across StockLedger's NestJS backend and client applications.

senior-debug-analyst.description: Diagnoses bugs, failures, and errors in StockLedger by tracing control flow across NestJS controllers/services, event handlers, Prisma queries, sync engine, and Electron client components.

senior-qa-test-engineer.description: Verifies code changes behave correctly under real conditions, writes meaningful regression tests, and validates event sourcing correctness, sync atomicity, and multi-tenant isolation in StockLedger.

ui-runtime-speed-optimizer.description: Reviews and improves user-perceived application speed in StockLedger's Electron desktop and React Native clients: app startup, tab switching, sync transitions, modal flows, and form submissions.
